title: Bridge Paper: Mindfulness Meditation: Impact on Attentional Control and Emotion Dysregulation.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, default mode network, creative cognition, involuntary thought.
**Phase context:** spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, creative cognition, default mode network, involuntary thought, daydreaming

Paper: Mindfulness Meditation: Impact on Attentional Control and Emotion Dysregulation.
DOI: 10.1093/arclin/acab053
Abstract: OBJECTIVE: Theoretical models of mindfulness meditation conceptualize the cultivation of focused attention and regulation of emotional states, with the attitudinal foundations that promote nonjudgment and acceptance, to facilitate cognitive and affective processing resulting in improved brain health. Within the scientific study of mindfulness meditation, outcomes assessing behavioral and neural correlates of attentional control and emotion regulation have been examined for their malleability as
